decision_reason: Exact 9-prompt DFlash suite improves current B=4 branch-copy ratio 0.867x -> 0.926x AR, but still does not beat AR or pass the >1.10x speed gate.

change.summary: Default verifier-sized W4 MLP down projections to existing row-wise pack8 GEMV for B+1<=8, with HIPENGINE_W4_DOWN_PROJ_SMALL_BATCH=prefill/off rollback and multi_row diagnostic retained.

notes: Metric contract only; PyTorch/HF parent hot loops are not production hipEngine runtime code.
Rows require same-session AR controls before any speedup can be promoted.
This promotes the exact row-wise GEMV down-projection path, not the faster multi-row weight-sharing down-projection path rejected by the prior 8/9 exactness result.
Acceptance is unchanged; remaining gap to AR is still dominated by low-acceptance prompts and target verifier cost.
